title: Lists (Arrays) 📋
description: Keep a list of ordered items.

slides.title: The Shopping List 🛒
slides.content:
When you have many items (like a list of scores), you shouldn't create 100 variables.

Use a `List`! Items live inside `[]` brackets.

slides.title: Creating a List
slides.content: Lists have 0-based indexes. The first item is at index 0:

quizData.question: What is the index of the first item in a Dart List?
quizData.explanation: Programmers count from 0. The first item is index 0!
